data.body: 6fe2 RED oracle authored + confirmed: tests/interfaces/facades/test_creation_channel.py, 23 tests across 7 selectors (cli/mcp/python recorded-channel + helper matrix, invalid x2, legacy, immutable, projections x5). RED run: all 23 FAIL for the right reason -- recorded-channel tests get creation_channel=None; invalid gets 'create_core() got unexpected kwarg creation_channel'; legacy/immutable get KeyError; schema/types/docs assertions fail on absent contract; export row lacks the field. (Fixed one test bug: CLI identity uses --name/--email flags not positionals.) Full oracle stashed at job-tmp. Next: hold out edge/contract tests, hand implementer only the 3 primary create-per-interface happy-path tests + full ACs.
